# Newark Law Offices

> Boutique legal representation and strategic advocacy serving corporate and individual clients throughout Texas and Oklahoma.

Newark Law Offices (legal entity: A Newark Firm, LLC) provides litigation, corporate advocacy, and strategic counsel with offices in Dallas, Texas and Edmond, Oklahoma.

## Pages

- [Home](https://newarkfirm.com/): Firm overview and practice areas
- [About](https://newarkfirm.com/about.html): Firm background and mission
- [Experience](https://newarkfirm.com/experience.html): Case experience and practice history
- [Our People](https://newarkfirm.com/people.html): Attorney and staff profiles
- [Insights](https://newarkfirm.com/insights.html): Legal insights and articles
- [Contact](https://newarkfirm.com/contact.html): Contact information for Texas and Oklahoma offices

## Related

- [MOD Mediations](https://modmediations.com/): Affiliated mediation and arbitration services, directed by the same principal
